assertions.title: Invalid or unreachable URL shows error

steps.action: Open settings panel via gear icon
steps.expected: Settings modal opens with tokenlist input
steps.observed: Settings modal opens with tokenlist input and Load button

steps.expected: Error message shown, no list entry created
steps.observed: Error message 'Invalid URL format' shown in red. No list entry created. PASS.

steps.expected: Error message shown, no list entry created
steps.observed: Error message 'URL must use HTTPS' shown in red. No list entry created. PASS.

steps.expected: Error message shown, no list entry created
steps.observed: A list entry WAS created with error state: '0 tokens', 'Failed to fetch remote URL: fetch failed', Retry button. Entry should NOT have been created per contract.

evidence.consoleErrors: Only favicon.ico 404 (cosmetic, ignored) and the expected fetch failure for unreachable URL

assertions.issues: Invalid URL and non-HTTPS URL cases correctly show error without creating an entry. However, unreachable HTTPS URL creates a list entry with error state instead of just showing an error message without creating an entry. The validation contract states 'No list entry is created' for all three cases, but the unreachable URL case creates an entry with error/retry UI.

assertions.title: Custom lists persisted across page reload

steps.action: Clear localStorage and reload to start fresh
steps.observed: Clean state with only Default Tokenlist
Uniswap Labs Default added, 87 tokens on Base
CoinGecko added, 0 tokens for Base (with chain mismatch warning)
Switch unchecked, enabled:false in localStorage

steps.action: Verify localStorage contains both lists with correct toggle states
steps.observed: customTokenlists: [{url:'https://tokens.uniswap.org', enabled:false, name:'Uniswap Labs Default'}, {url:'https://tokens.coingecko.com/uniswap/all.json', enabled:true, name:'CoinGecko'}]

steps.expected: Same lists with same toggle states
steps.observed: Default Tokenlist ON, Uniswap Labs Default OFF (preserved), CoinGecko ON with '0 tokens for Base' warning (preserved). Token counts re-fetched correctly.

steps.action: Remove customTokenlists from localStorage and set old customTokenlistUrl='https://tokens.uniswap.org'
steps.observed: customTokenlistUrl set, customTokenlists removed
Page loaded successfully

steps.expected: Old key removed, new key with migrated entry
steps.observed: customTokenlistUrl: null (removed), customTokenlists: [{url:'https://tokens.uniswap.org', enabled:true, name:'https://tokens.uniswap.org'}]

steps.expected: Migrated list appears as enabled custom list
steps.observed: Uniswap Labs Default appears with 87 tokens, enabled toggle, remove button

steps.action: With Uniswap Labs Default loaded, open settings on Base chain
steps.observed: Default Tokenlist: 87 tokens, Uniswap Labs Default: 87 tokens

steps.action: Close settings, switch chain to Ethereum, reopen settings
steps.observed: Default Tokenlist: 357 tokens, Uniswap Labs Default: 357 tokens
Base: 87, Ethereum: 357 — counts are chain-specific

assertions.title: Failed list on reload shows error state

steps.action: Set localStorage with a custom list pointing to an unreachable URL (https://this-will-definitely-fail-404.example.com/tokenlist.json)
steps.observed: customTokenlists saved with failing URL entry

steps.action: Reload page and wait for fetch attempts
steps.expected: Fetch fails for the bad URL
steps.observed: Console shows fetch failure for the unreachable URL

steps.expected: Failed list shows with error indicator and retry option
steps.observed: List entry 'Failing List' appears with: '0 tokens', red error text 'Failed to fetch remote URL: fetch failed', green 'Retry' button, toggle switch, and remove button. Not silently removed.

evidence.consoleErrors: Expected fetch error for unreachable URL (not a bug)

assertions.title: All settings preserved across page reload

steps.action: Set up state: Default Tokenlist OFF, Uniswap Labs Default ON
steps.observed: Default Tokenlist switch unchecked, Uniswap Labs Default switch checked
Screenshot shows Default Tokenlist OFF, Uniswap Labs Default ON

Custom list URLs preserved (Uniswap Labs Default still present). Custom list toggle state preserved (Uniswap Labs Default still ON). BUT Default Tokenlist toggle state NOT preserved — was OFF, reverted to ON.
Only 'customTokenlists' key exists in localStorage. No key for default tokenlist toggle state. Default tokenlist always resets to enabled on reload.

assertions.issues: Default Tokenlist toggle state is not persisted in localStorage. After reload, it always resets to ON regardless of the pre-reload state. Custom tokenlist URLs and their toggle states are correctly persisted (verified in VAL-MULTI-008). The assertion requires 'All settings preserved across page reload' which should include the Default Tokenlist toggle.

frictions.description: Auto-refresh timer (15s) can interfere with UI testing by reloading data. Need to call clearInterval(window._refreshTimer) via page.evaluate() after each page load.
Direct DOM manipulation (setting input.value + dispatching input event) required for tokenlist URL input field, as Playwright fill/type sometimes interacts poorly with custom input handling.
frictions.resolution: Used page.evaluate() to set input values and dispatch events programmatically

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-MULTI-008, VAL-MULTI-009, VAL-MULTI-010, VAL-MULTI-011), 2 failed (VAL-MULTI-007: unreachable URL creates list entry instead of showing error only; VAL-CROSS-007: Default Tokenlist toggle state not persisted across reload).
